overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a grand gothic library interior at night, featuring warm ambient lighting from lamps and chandeliers. A figure sits reading in the foreground while the camera remains stationary, capturing the ornate multi-story bookshelves and architectural details. Another person briefly walks through the background archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand library reading room with towering bookshelves and upper balconies

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the library interior from a fixed position, focusing on the seated reader and architectural surroundings

notable_agents.action: sitting in a leather armchair reading a book in the foreground
walking from right to left through the distant archway in the background

entered.detail: large dark wood desk with papers and a lamp on top, positioned centrally in the room
upholstered armchair with high back where the seated character is positioned
ornate circular patterned rug beneath the central desk area
floor-to-ceiling wooden bookshelves lining the walls, filled with books and extending to upper balconies
gothic stone archway leading to another section of the library, where the background figure walks through
ornate chandelier hanging from the ceiling, providing warm ambient light
small green-shaded lamp on the reception desk
wooden railings of the second and third floor balconies overlooking the main floor

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic shot of a grand gothic library interior illuminated by warm lamplight. A character sits reading in a leather armchair in the left foreground, surrounded by towering wooden bookshelves and ornate architectural details including arched doorways and upper balconies. Approximately halfway through the clip, a second character enters from the right background and walks through the arched doorway toward the left, crossing the distant part of the room before exiting the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a grand gothic library that remains poised in a state of quiet, nocturnal study. It begins with a focus on a character reading in a leather armchair in the left foreground, framed by towering wooden bookshelves and ornate architectural details. As the scene unfolds, the warm lamplight illuminates the depth of the room, drawing attention to the arched doorways and upper balconies. The stillness is then interrupted as a second character enters from the right background and walks through the distant archway toward the left. The camera maintains its steady gaze as the figure crosses the room and finally exits the frame, returning the library to its initial silence.
